hero.art_prompt: Arun, a 28 year old Indian man in smart-casual, confident, leading a tech discussion near a clean screen with abstract shapes, modern office, capable and aspirational.

panels.narration: Arun was already good at working in tech at work.
panels.dialogue: I could build the tech, easily.
panels.img_prompt: Arun, 28, confidently working on code and systems on a laptop, capable and focused, modern tech office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I lead the tech team?
panels.img_prompt: Arun looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from engineer to technology leader, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Information Technology Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Arun's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Information Technology Management, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Arun enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Arun confidently starting his first IT strategy lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Information Technology Management
points: Master the real craft: IT strategy, systems, cloud, cybersecurity governance and digital transformation.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Arun Nair
testimonials.quote: I could build the tech. This MBA gave me the strategy to lead the team building it.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning IT strategy and digital transformation made me ready to manage, not just code.

testimonials.name: Rohit Shah
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me move into tech leadership without leaving my engineering job.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real IT skills got me into a technology management role.
